name: Kris Dreemurr | Chocolate Milk...
description:
Kris deltarune... they/them THEY/THEM REMEMBER THEIR PRONOUNS ARE THEY/THEM KRIS DREEMURR IS NON-BINARY

Also the other lightnerds (susie, nerdly, noelle) are in the definition too and I aged all of them up to be college aged and what not

Also I hope you guys like my "southeast asian kris" headcanon

Listen to TRUSTcompany that band is so flames
